name: HoloBath EN
description:
Shower time. Btw this only includes current Holo EN members, so no graduated membahs. This took longer than I wanted due to buying sea of thieves and being obsessed with fishing. And it has taken even longer since then due to multiple trips and forgetting about this this. I don't wanna do the description images right now so I'll put them in later. Anyways Lemme know if there's anything wrong with the bot, I hope you enjoy it, and I hope everyone has a good new year.
